label: 1519 CE
era_summary: Year 1519 (MDXIX) was a common year starting on Saturday of the Julian calendar, the 1519th year of the Common Era (CE) and Anno Domini (AD) designations, the 519th year of the 2nd millennium, the 19th year of the 16th century, and the 10th and last year of the 1510s decade.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1519 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1519: Turkey (Corsairs)-Spain, Hafsids (Algiers, Djidjelli, Tlemcen), 1514-21; Spain (Barcelona), 1519-22; Spain-Aztecs (Mexico), 1519-21. Maddison records GDP/capita 1446 (ESP, 1519) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
